sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using AMLIQ ("the Service"), operated by FinSavvy AI Ltd., you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.body: AMLIQ provides AI-enhanced anti-money laundering (AML) and sanctions screening services, including entity screening, batch processing, alert management, and compliance dashboards for financial institutions and regulated entities.

sections.title: 3. Eligibility
sections.body: The Service is available to businesses and professionals in the financial services and compliance industry. You must be at least 18 years old and authorized to bind your organization to these terms.

sections.title: 4. Account Registration
sections.body: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities under your account.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.body: You agree not to: (a) use the Service for any unlawful purpose; (b) attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Service; (c) share credentials or provide access to unauthorized users; (d) use the Service to circumvent sanctions or compliance obligations.

sections.title: 6. Data Processing
sections.body: AMLIQ processes screening data on your behalf as a data processor. You retain ownership of all data you submit. We process data solely to provide the Service and as described in our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 7. Service Level Agreement
sections.body: We target 99.9% uptime for the screening API. Scheduled maintenance windows will be communicated at least 48 hours in advance. Current system status is available on our status page.

sections.title: 8. Billing and Payment
sections.body: Subscription fees are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis. Usage-based charges are billed in arrears. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law or described in our refund policy.

sections.title: 9. Intellectual Property
sections.body: The Service, including its algorithms, models, and user interface, is the intellectual property of FinSavvy AI Ltd. Your subscription grants a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Service.

sections.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: AMLIQ is a screening tool and does not constitute legal advice. You are responsible for all compliance decisions. To the maximum extent permitted by law, our total liability shall not exceed the fees paid in the preceding 12 months.

sections.title: 11. Termination
sections.body: Either party may terminate the subscription with 30 days written notice. We may suspend access immediately for violation of these terms. Upon termination, your data will be available for export for 30 days.

sections.title: 12. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We may update these terms with 30 days notice. Continued use after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.title: 13. Contact
sections.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@amliq.finance.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.body: FinSavvy AI Ltd. ("we", "us") operates AMLIQ, an AI-enhanced AML screening platform. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.body: Account data: name, email, organization, country, and role when you register. Screening data: entity names, identifiers, and related data you submit for screening. Usage data: API calls, feature usage, and performance metrics. Technical data: IP address, browser type, and device information.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your information to: provide and improve the screening service; process billing; send service communications; monitor system performance; comply with legal obligations; and prevent fraud or misuse.

sections.title: 4. Data Processing Role
sections.body: For screening data, we act as a data processor on your behalf. You remain the data controller and are responsible for ensuring you have a lawful basis to process the personal data you submit.

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
sections.body: Account data is retained for the duration of your subscription plus 30 days. Screening results are retained per your tenant configuration. Audit logs are retained for 7 years as required by financial regulations.

sections.title: 6. Data Security
sections.body: We implement industry-standard security measures including: encryption in transit (TLS 1.3); application-layer encryption of sensitive fields before storage; role-based access controls and audit logging; and continuous vulnerability scanning of dependencies and container images. Periodic third-party penetration testing is planned ahead of commercial launch.

sections.title: 7. Data Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your data. We may share data with: infrastructure providers (hosting, database) under strict data processing agreements; law enforcement when legally required; and professional advisors under confidentiality obligations.

sections.title: 8. International Transfers
sections.body: Data may be processed in data centers in the US and EU. We use Standard Contractual Clauses and ensure adequate safeguards for international transfers in compliance with GDPR.

sections.title: 9. Your Rights
sections.body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to: access, correct, or delete your personal data; restrict or object to processing; data portability; and withdraw consent. Contact privacy@amliq.finance to exercise these rights.

sections.title: 10. Cookies
sections.body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We use analytics cookies only with your consent. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

sections.title: 11. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification at least 30 days before they take effect.

sections.title: 12. Contact
sections.body: Data Protection Officer: privacy@amliq.finance
